versions.correctionNotice: A small error occurred in the Deaths data (Table 2.1b) covering Sefton and St Helen's. This was due to a processing error with the geography codes. We have corrected this error for the years 2015 and 2016. You can see all previous versions of these data on the previous versions page. We apologise for any inconvenience.

A small error occurred in the actives data (table 3.1b) covering 6 districts within Northern Ireland and the 4-year survivals data (table 5.1b) between Camden and City of London. These were due to processing errors with the geography codes on those tables. We have corrected these errors for the 2018 data. You can see all previous versions of this data on the previous versions page. We apologise for any inconvenience caused.

A small discrepancy occurred in the Year 1 survivals tables produced for the accompanying 2018 births, whereby survival rates for specific districts were incorrect.  In addition, some Scottish districts were misaligned with the data in tab 5.1b.
Corrections to Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland country codes in tab 6.1.

A small discrepancy occurred in the Year 1 survival table (tab 4.1) whereby the count and percentage rate of 2019 survivals broken-down by region were incorrect. We apologise for any inconvenience caused.
